title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Oliveboard Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Oliveboard Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Oliveboard Holdings Services family as a Teacher in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Oliveboard Holdings Services:
Oliveboard Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard Holdings Services!
